column1: Table S10. Concentrations of individual PFAS (ng/L) detected in tapwater samples collected from public supply and private wells, 2016-2021. Also included are the number of PFAS detected in each sample and the sum of detected PFAS (∑PFAS; ng/L), cumulative exposure activity ratios (∑EAR), and toxicity quotients (∑TQ). Note only samples with PFAS detections are reported. For information on the total number of samples collected and for a complete list of compounds analyzed and their detection limits see Table S3. For information on individual studies see Table S1. [NA; not analyzed, nd; not detected, ng/L; nanogram per liter, '-'; ∑EAR not analyzed because there were no ToxCast activity cutoff concentrations for the detected PFAS.
